name: Lime Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the pickling cucumbers thoroughly in cold water.
2. Place the cucumbers in a large bowl and cover with 2 cups of lime juice and enough cold water to cover them completely. Allow to soak for 24 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain the cucumbers and rinse again in cold water several times.
4. Pat the cucumbers dry with paper towels and place them in a clean jar.
5. In a large bowl or pot, combine vinegar, salt, sugar, celery seed, cloves, mixed spices, and lime juice to make the pickling mixture. Stir until well combined.
6. Pour the pickling mixture over the cucumbers, ensuring they are completely covered. Seal the jar tightly.
7. Bring the contents of the jar to a boil in a large pot or pressure canner for 35 minutes, maintaining a rolling boil for at least 10 minutes longer than the processing time specified for your method of canning.
8. Remove from heat and allow jars to cool completely on a towel.
